entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Course perpustakaan ialah strongest apabila search query matches known skill, topik, atau standard.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Khan Academy alternatif untuk langsung Pembelajaran AI moments.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Pelajar yang memilih antara alat biasanya memerlukan salah satu daripada tiga perkara: kurikulum berstruktur, tutor langsung untuk titik buntu, atau gelung latihan yang membantu idea kekal dipelajari.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Pelajar often moves melalui prepared videos, artikel, exercises, dan dashboards.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Pelajar bermula inside mod-khusus chat dan boleh tanya untuk simpler model, harder soalan, kuiz, kad imbas deck, atau critique.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Each perbandingan ialah written untuk menjadi fair, berguna, dan action-oriented: apa known alat ialah good untuk, di mana inspir ialah different, dan yang mana awam mod untuk buka pertama.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Each halaman pautan perbandingan intent untuk langsung mod, panduan, prompt, dan Boleh dibaca AI discovery files.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Setiap pautan di sini bersifat awam dan boleh dirayap. Sembang peribadi pengguna tidak dimasukkan dalam perbandingan, peta laman, atau fail penemuan yang boleh dibaca AI.

entries.source: External facts are linked to official sources.
entries.value: Luaran facts ialah dipautkan untuk rasmi sources.

entries.source: Fair comparisons help learners choose faster.
entries.value: Fair perbandingan help pelajar pilih faster.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: inspir perbandingan halaman patut menjadi berguna tanpa pretending another platform ialah static. Semak rasmi sources untuk latest produk details.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah dibina sekitar awam guest AI mod: Soalan Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, math steps, maklum balas penulisan, kuiz, kad imbas, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Khan Academy Alternatif untuk Langsung AI Tutoring

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy dibina sekitar perpustakaan luas pelajaran, latihan, kandungan selaras standard, dan sokongan penguasaan.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy ialah excellent untuk structured lessons dan practice. inspir ialah dibina untuk moment pelajar memerlukan langsung, promptable AI mod itu boleh respond untuk mereka exact soalan, draft, problem, hujah, atau pelan belajar.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: Khanmigo rasmi halaman

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Pelajar often search dengan produk mereka already know. berguna jawapan bukan winner-take-all; ia ialah yang mana alat behavior fits job.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Pelajar siapa mempunyai khusus soalan dan memerlukan bantu now.

entries.source: Learning shape
entries.value: Bentuk pembelajaran

entries.source: Learning workflow
entries.value: Aliran kerja pembelajaran

entries.source: Live help
entries.value: Bantuan langsung

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Langsung mod, panduan, dan aliran kerja berkaitan untuk ini perbandingan.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Many pelajar search oleh comparing alat mereka already know. jelas perbandingan halaman membantu mereka pilih right pembelajaran behavior tanpa hiding tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Tidak. perbandingan pautan only untuk awam guest-mod entrypoints, panduan, prompt libraries, dan laluan pembelajaran. Peribadi tersimpan conversations bukan used as source Kandungan.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Tidak. perbandingan halaman ialah written untuk show apabila inspir ialah lebih baik pertama click untuk langsung AI tutoring, prompt, dan guest mod pembelajaran, dan apabila structured curriculum atau rasmi course perpustakaan boleh still menjadi berguna.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Tidak. Mereka pautan only untuk halaman awam, mod tetamu awam, panduan, prompt, dan laluan pembelajaran. Peribadi sembang tersimpan stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Tidak untuk semua keperluan pembelajaran. Khan Academy berguna untuk pelajaran berstruktur dan latihan. inspir berguna apabila pelajar memerlukan bantuan AI langsung, soalan Sokratik, petunjuk, kuiz, kad imbas, maklum balas, atau aliran kerja belajar sekitar perkara tepat yang sedang mereka usahakan.

entries.value: Sumber rasmi

entries.value: Buka Belajar Apa Sahaja, tanya untuk prerequisite ideas, then switch menjadi Arahan Sokratik untuk uji anda model.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Tampal soalan, perkara yang anda cuba, dan titik buntu. Minta petunjuk berguna paling kecil, bukan jawapan akhir.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Orang siapa belajar lebih baik melalui conversation, soalan, kuiz, dan kad imbas.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, dan exercises ialah strongest apabila pelajar knows topik sequence.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Awam mod ialah tuned untuk explanations, Soalan Sokratik, hints, step checks, kuiz, dan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Awam topik URLs let searches such as Tutor AI Sokratik, AI Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, AI Pembina Kad Imbas, dan talk untuk tokoh sejarah AI land directly dalam matching mod.

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor alternative
entries.value: Alternatif tutor AI Sokratik

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: Tutor AI Sokratik untuk pelajar

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Some searches memerlukan course perpustakaan. Some memerlukan langsung Tutor AI, hint, Sokratik soalan, kuiz, atau kad imbas deck. Ini halaman jadikan itu choice clearer.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Mula di sini

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Mula belajar

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Structured practice membantu bina foundations sebelum dan selepas kerja rumah.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Pelajar siapa want hints atau step checks tanpa penyalinan jawapan.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Guru atau ibu bapa evaluating berfokus Pembelajaran AI behaviors sebelum sekolah deployment.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Perbandingan searches ini hab ialah dibina untuk jawapan.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Point bukan untuk flatten two different alat menjadi one winner. point ialah untuk match tugas pembelajaran untuk behavior itu membantu fastest.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Searches ini halaman ialah designed untuk jawapan.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Ini ialah high-intent moments di mana pelajar usually memerlukan langsung teaching behavior berbanding another luas halaman.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Ini phrases ialah surfaced naturally di halaman dan dalam structured discovery files so perayap boleh fahami exact perbandingan intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Ini bukan dakwaan itu pelajar patut abandon Khan Academy. Untuk many topik, trusted lesson perpustakaan dan langsung Mod pembelajaran AI work terbaik together: belajar foundation, then use inspir untuk tanya soalan, baiki confusion, practise recall, atau get unstuck.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Perbandingan alat

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Try langsung AI laluan pembelajaran.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Tukar explanation menjadi kuiz soalan, kad imbas, dan ulang kaji schedule based di apa anda miss.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tuisyen

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Gunakan mod langsung apabila anda tahu titik kekeliruan yang tepat dan mahukan penjelasan, soalan, petunjuk, atau gelung ulang kaji seterusnya.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Use structured lesson apabila anda know course area dan want sequenced explanation atau practice set.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Kes penggunaan

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Use perbandingan halaman untuk laluan search menjadi action.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Use inspir pertama apabila anda search ialah tentang action: jelaskan ini simply, tanya saya Soalan Sokratik, give saya kerja rumah hint, semak saya math step, kuiz saya, bina kad imbas, debate ini topik, atau bantu saya plan revision.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Use inspir untuk tukar confusion menjadi soalan, contoh, retrieval practice, maklum balas penulisan, debate, dan peribadi pelan belajar.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Use inspir apabila stuck point ialah khusus.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Use inspir apabila anda want percuma awam Mod pembelajaran AI itu boleh jelaskan, soalan, kuiz, coach kerja rumah, bina kad imbas, dan adapt untuk exact thing anda ialah stuck di.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Use structured lessons apabila laluan ialah known.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Use perbandingan below untuk pick pertama awam mod atau panduan.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Use lesson perpustakaan untuk belajar rasmi sequence dan practise core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Use right alat untuk tugas pembelajaran.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Use Jelajah Masa atau Tokoh sejarah mod, sambil keeping generated dialogue separate daripada documented sources.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Want langsung pembelajaran version right now?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Bila patut Saya use inspir pertama?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Bila hendak digunakan

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Apabila untuk use {value1}, dan apabila untuk buka inspir.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Mengapa jadikan perbandingan halaman pada all?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Ya. good aliran kerja ialah untuk belajar foundation daripada trusted lesson source, then use inspir untuk tanya follow-up soalan, practise recall, baiki salah tanggapan, dan plan apa untuk ulang kaji seterusnya.
